sql_array: CREATE TABLE TestJavaProperties (id INT, property_name VARCHAR(255), property_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO TestJavaProperties (id, property_name, property_value) VALUES (1, 'example.property', 'value1');
UPDATE TestJavaProperties SET property_value = 'new_value' WHERE property_name = 'example.property';
SELECT property_name, property_value FROM TestJavaProperties WHERE id = 1;
